## How I verified it
<!-- Commands you ran. e.g. `npm test`, a manual flow, the daemon log. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New verbs return `{ ok, ... }` (and a `verify` block for mutating actions)
- [ ] Added/updated a test where practical
- [ ] Updated docs (README / docs/) if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] No secrets, no personal info, no hard-coded paths
- [ ] Honest about limits — no overselling
- [ ] On-mission: not a feature for circumventing security / CAPTCHAs / anti-abuse (see ACCEPTABLE_USE.md)
